tasks.description: Implement src/core/greeting.ts with explicit type-safe function exports for greeting, welcome, and farewell utilities.
tasks.changes:
- Create greeting utility
+ Implement src/core/greeting.ts with three exported functions: greet(name: string): string, welcome(name: string): string, farewell(name: string): string. Use template literals. Handle undefined input names by substituting 'World', 'User', and 'Friend' respectively.
